---
title: "Pew Assignment"
author: "Sam Eckhardt and Joey Miranda"
date: "Sunday, November 16, 2014"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(rCharts)
library(reshape2)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
SelectData<-mydata%>%
  select(4,6:11,100:760)%>%
  select(1:7,87,100:660)%>%
  select(1:8,200:569)%>%
  select(1:8,31,32,100:378)%>%
  select(1,3:10,96,97)


rPlot(x="Q1",y="count(Q1)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q4",y="count(Q4)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q5",y="count(Q5)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q6",y="count(Q6)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q7",y="count(Q7)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q8",y="count(Q8)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q47US",y="count(Q47US)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="Q164",y="count(Q164)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="PARTY",y="count(PARTY)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
rPlot(x="PARTYLN",y="count(PARTYLN)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
